title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 433.150 - Notice of application
text:
433.150.  Notice of application. — A notice in writing of such intended application, together with a copy of the petition, shall be personally served on the principal in the bond, at least fifteen days before the making of the application.
(RSMo 1939 § 3332) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2945; 1919 § 12701; 1909 § 11283
